category_sources: source_facts.description says Console Bonsai is a bonsai tree generator written in C using ncurses; official GitLab README says cbonsai generates configurable terminal bonsai trees.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cbonsai; official GitLab project and README heading use cbonsai.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README contains installation and usage; official repository includes cbonsai.scd man-page source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.com/jallbrit/cbonsai, so repo is returned as null per instruction not to second-guess existing repository values.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ncurses and bonsai generation; official GitLab README describes static and live modes and configurable CLI options.
